title: UAPGerb: “The New Area51 Is HERE in Utah!”
summary: This interview covers UFO crash retrieval programs, psionic phenomena in UAP research, and whistleblower testimonies including Jake Barber, Michael Herrera, and Jonathan Wagant. The discussion explores connections between legacy programs, Department of Energy involvement, and the role of consciousness/ESP in understanding and operating recovered craft.

key_claims.claim: The foreign technology division tried to use recovered technology to guide ICBM missiles using human brain waves
The 1983 Strategic Defense Initiative likely had a back door to fund UAP programs and act offensively against UAP
The operators of the Roswell craft were part of the guidance system according to Corso
Jake Barber's video on News Nation wasn't taken by Jake and was rushed and overhyped
Jonathan Wagant saw DOE lettered rain jackets on crash recovery team members
Michael Herrera saw a human-made craft, not an extraterrestrial craft
The crash retrieval teams include NEST teams from DOE and separate private teams of former JSOC Tier One operators
The Interplanetary Phenomenon Unit existed between 1947 and 1950, confirmed in 1986 to William Steinman
Eric A. Walker said he knew about Majestic 12 for 40 years and that understanding ESP was required to comprehend the reality
Philip Corso's book Day After Roswell had content added by co-writer that Corso was unhappy with, given only 24 hours to edit
Robert Sarbacher picked up Thomas Townsend Brown in a black Cadillac after his 1956 Paris experiment
The Office of Naval Research published studies on a sixth sense in humans in 2011 and 2012
Randy Anderson was shown technology that responded to human consciousness at Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane
A mutual friend Jordan saw the same consciousness-reactive sphere when involved in the Gate program as a late teen
Lou Elizondo was part of a group called Gray Fox involved in going into extremely sensitive sites for JSOC
